description: A square designed recruitment/partnership promo graphic for ICE's 287(g) program. The photograph shows the back of an officer in the right foreground wearing a gray plate carrier vest with the word 'POLICE' stenciled in large yellow block letters across the shoulders; the vest has MOLLE webbing and what appears to be a holstered weapon at the hip. In the background, rendered in desaturated/black-and-white tones to contrast with the foreground, two more tactical officers stand near the front door and walkway of a suburban two-story house with pale clapboard siding, suggesting a residential enforcement operation. The composition places a large two-line headline across the lower-center of the image: 'Strengthen Your' in white serif italic type, with 'Force' beneath it in very large bold yellow serif lettering (a play on 'task force' / strengthening a local police force). Bottom-left bears the DHS seal and the agency wordmark 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white. Bottom-right reads 'ICE.gov/287g' (white 'ICE.gov/' and yellow '287g'). The messaging targets local and state law-enforcement agencies, recruiting them into ICE's 287(g) deputization program by associating participation with tactical strength and authority; the propaganda technique is aspirational/empowerment branding using muscular police imagery and the ICE blue/yellow color scheme.
notable_text: Strengthen Your Force; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; ICE.gov/287g; POLICE
